prompt: Create an implementation plan for the admin dashboard feature. The brainstorm designed three backend endpoints (GET /api/admin/infrastructure, GET /api/admin/workshops/summary, GET /api/admin/workshops/{id}/progress) gated by facilitator role, and a React page at /admin with three independent panels (InfrastructurePanel, WorkshopSummaryPanel, WorkshopDetailTable). Each panel auto-refreshes every 30 seconds. No new database tables — all data derived from existing tables. The draft ADMIN_DASHBOARD_SPEC has 16 success criteria across 6 categories.
assertions: Plan header references ADMIN_DASHBOARD_SPEC by name and lists specific success criteria
Plan includes a file map table with new and modified files
Tasks follow TDD pattern: write failing test -> run to verify fail -> implement -> run to verify pass -> commit
Test code blocks include @pytest.mark.spec or @spec and @pytest.mark.req or @req tags
Steps reference exact file paths (not vague descriptions like 'the test file')
Steps include exact verification commands using 'just test-' or 'just spec-coverage'
Final task verifies spec coverage with just spec-coverage and just spec-validate
Plan includes an Implementation Log entry for the spec
Tasks are ordered correctly: backend endpoints before frontend components before routing/wiring
